problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
